mapper.select: SELECT u.id, u.nickname, u.username, u.email, u.phone, /* 使用 GROUP_CONCAT 将该用户的所有角色名拼接成一个字符串，例如 "审核员,项目经理" */ GROUP_CONCAT(r.role_name SEPARATOR ',') as roleNames FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_user_role ur ON u.id = ur.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_role r ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE u.delete_flag = '0' AND u.status = '1' /* 核心逻辑：只查询那些【拥有指定 roleKey】的用户ID */ AND u.id IN ( SELECT distinct temp_ur.user_id FROM sys_user_role temp_ur LEFT JOIN sys_role temp_r ON temp_ur.role_id = temp_r.id WHERE temp_r.role_key = #{roleKey} ) GROUP BY u.id, u.nickname, u.username, u.email, u.phone
